column1: # QMK physical position (1..76, flat LAYOUT_ergodox_pretty arg order)
#   <-> ZMK physical position (1..76, matrix-transform order; ZMK binding
#   index 0 is &bootloader and is excluded here).
# Positions 1-64 (rows 1-5) are identity. The 12 thumb keys (65-76) are a
# permutation: QMK's "pretty" arg order and ZMK's matrix order arrange the
# same physical thumb cluster differently. Derived from geometry and
# cross-checked: every base-mac thumb key aligns semantically under this map.
